vocab.example: I gravitate towards family vans primarily for their spacious interior, which ensures comfort during long-haul journeys.

vocab.meaning: kiểu dáng gầm thấp (đặc trưng của xe thể thao)
vocab.example: I've always been captivated by exotic cars with a low-slung profile that conveys a sense of speed even when stationary.

vocab.meaning: khả năng tăng tốc mượt mà
vocab.example: Electric sedans appeal to me because they offer seamless acceleration without the jarring gear shifts of traditional engines.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế bố cục tối ưu hóa cho người dùng (công thái học)
vocab.example: I prefer high-end German cars because they feature an ergonomic layout where every control is within easy reach of the driver.

vocab.meaning: hệ dẫn động bốn bánh toàn thời gian
vocab.example: For someone living in mountainous regions, a vehicle with a robust all-wheel drive system is a top priority for safety.
